# ByteWorthy LLC

Software studio building multi-tenant AI infrastructure, HIPAA-ready healthcare boilerplates, and operator-first open-source tools. Buy once, self-host, own the source. No subscriptions, no telemetry.

## Canonical links

- Website: https://byteworthy.io
- Boilerplates hub: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates
- Services: https://byteworthy.io/services
- About: https://byteworthy.io/about
- Contact: https://byteworthy.io/contact
- GitHub overview: https://byteworthy.io/github
- Discord: https://byteworthy.io/discord
- Newsletter: https://byteworthy.io/newsletter

## Boilerplate family

| Boilerplate | License | Repository |
|---|---|---|
| Sovra (open-source foundation) | MIT | https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra |
| Klienta (agency client portals) | Commercial | https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta |
| Clynova (HIPAA-ready healthcare) | Commercial | https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova |

## Open-source tools

- honeypot-med — prompt-injection evidence for healthcare AI: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/honeypot-med
- byteworthy-defend — open-source CLI antivirus (Windows + Linux): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/byteworthy-defend
- vqol — patient-owned VEINES-QOL/Sym PWA tracker: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/vqol
- hightimized — browser-only hospital-bill audit + dispute letter generator: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/hightimized
- outbreaktinder — historic public-health events as a swipe deck (CC0): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/outbreaktinder

## Access model

- Sovra source is public (MIT). Self-host freely.
- Klienta and Clynova commercial source is private and license-gated. Source is provisioned to a private GitHub repository after license purchase.
- Open-source tools are MIT (or CC0 for outbreaktinder dataset). Self-host freely.
- ByteWorthy never reaches into deployed instances. No telemetry.

## Developer defaults

- Contributing: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/.github/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
- Support: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/.github/blob/main/SUPPORT.md
- Security: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/.github/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- PR template: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/.github/blob/main/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md

## Positioning

ByteWorthy is a software studio and dev shop. Primary services: custom builds, boilerplate licensing, AI consulting. Focus segments: healthcare practices and growing SMB operations. Core promise: clients own the code and can self-host.
